hypothesis: Incorporating GFN1-xTB-derived atom-resolved spin densities and projected density-of-states (pDOS) features into the ∆-learning XGBoost model will reduce the MAE for HSE06 band gap predictions on MOFs containing 3d transition metals (Cr, Mn, Fe, Co, Ni) by at least 30% relative to the current ∆-learning model trained only on ST-135, RACs and APRDF descriptors.
